work_items.title: Implement SW-001
work_items.description: Design, implement, and verify capability for The software shall implement: build ICD capabilities on DA14531 according to schematics PlanSpeak Schematic V3.pdf

work_items.title: Implement SW-002
work_items.description: Design, implement, and verify capability for The software shall implement: the red/green user LEDs mentioned in the ICD are controlled via P0_5 and P0_11

work_items.title: Implement SW-003
work_items.description: Design, implement, and verify capability for The software shall implement: the user push button is on P0_10

work_items.title: Implement SW-004
work_items.description: Design, implement, and verify capability for The software shall implement: eN_Peripherals is on P0_6

work_items.title: Implement SW-005
work_items.description: Design, implement, and verify capability for The software shall implement: i2C SCL is on P0_8 and SDA on P0_9

work_items.title: Implement SW-006
work_items.description: Design, implement, and verify capability for The software shall implement: the photodiode current is read by the ADS1115IDGSR. AIN0 is for reading the PD current for all the external LEDs (that is, in a measurement each wavelength an LED is turns on and the signal is read on AIN0 in all LED cases) AIN1 is signal for PPFD signal

work_items.title: Implement SW-007
work_items.description: Design, implement, and verify capability for The software shall implement: the wavelength LEDs are driven by LP5816 hanging off the PCA9846PWJ. LED1/2/3/4 are on the LP5816 on channel SC1/SD1 the PCA9846PWJ with LEDs 5/6 are on the LP5816 on channel SC2/SD2 on the PCA9846PWJ

work_items.title: Implement SW-008
work_items.description: Design, implement, and verify capability for The software shall implement: leaf temperature is on MLX90632SLD-BCB-000-RE connected to SC0/SD0 on the PCA9846PWJ

work_items.title: Implement SW-009
work_items.description: Design, implement, and verify capability for The software shall implement: rH and ambient temp are read from HDC2010YPAR using DA14531 I2C bus

work_items.title: Implement SW-010
work_items.description: Design, implement, and verify capability for The software shall implement: accelerometer is from MXC4005XC using DA14531 I2C bus

work_items.title: Implement SW-011
work_items.description: Design, implement, and verify capability for The software shall implement: red/green user LEDs not available - can use dev board LED for initial dev work and testing

work_items.title: Implement SW-012
work_items.description: Design, implement, and verify capability for The software shall implement: eN_Peripherals no avaiable

work_items.title: Implement SW-013
work_items.description: Design, implement, and verify capability for The software shall implement: all external I2C devices not available (so use canned data for testing but again still develop hanrdware interfaces to do real work when target board comes)

work_items.title: Implement SW-014
work_items.description: Design, implement, and verify capability for The software shall implement: user push button not available

arbitration_records.topic: Verification standard for Detailed Design Notes
arbitration_records.decision: Development may proceed only with requirement-linked tests and recorded evidence.
arbitration_records.rationale: The software lead prioritizes deterministic verification over implementation speed. Dev agents can propose implementation shortcuts, but test evidence remains the release gate.
required_follow_up: Each implementation task must reference at least one software requirement.
Each software requirement must have planned unit, system, and acceptance test evidence.
